description: Product Description Anboor Small Monster Squishies Squishy Monster Anboor is a professional manufacturer dedicated in designing, developing, and producing adorable squishies. We understand the importance of providing our customers with fun, safe, and durable toys. That's why we use only the best materials and production methods to create our squishy toys. With a commitment to creating high-quality and innovative products, it has become a well-known brand in the toy industry. With the features of sweetly scent and soft tactile touch, Anboor squishies include a wide variety of squishy toys in different shapes, sizes, and colors, are loved by kids and adults. They are kawaii and slow-rising, and are able to relieve your stress by squeezing them. Anboor squishies are also great educational tools to inspire Children’s imagination and creativity. Anboor committed to providing customers with the best possible experience, has a rigorous quality control process to ensure that every product meets our high standards, and your satisfied shopping experience is our main goal. If you are looking for a stress-relieving toy, a sensory play tool, or a cute collectible, both fun and functional, Anboor have something for everyone. Detail Display Squishy toys are great for stress relief. The soft and pliable texture of the toy can help reduce anxiety and promote relaxation. Squeezing and manipulating the toy can help to release tension. Slow rising toys can also help to improve focus and concentration. The repetitive motion of squeezing and releasing the toy can help to keep the mind focused and engaged. This can be particularly helpful for people with other attention-related conditions. Squishies toys are also a fun and entertaining toy to play with. They come in a variety of shapes and sizes, which can make them visually appealing. Additionally, slow rise toys can be a great tool for sensory play, allowing children and adults to explore different textures and sensations.
